cases.title: Reymond et al. v. Illiana Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 1, a complaint of Robert L. Reymond et al. against Illiana Presbytery, to be in order and elected a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Barleman et al. v. Presbytery of the Ascension

parties.complainant_or_appellant: Reval H. Barleman, Jr., et al.

cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 2, a complaint of Reval H. Barleman, Jr. et al. against the Presbytery of the Ascension, to be in order and elected a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Wilbor et al. v. North Georgia Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 7, a complaint of Stark P. Wilbor et al. against North Georgia Presbytery, to be in order and elected a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Hamilton et al. v. Eastern Carolina Presbytery
topics: case found irregular but of sufficient importance
cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 9, a complaint of Hamilton et al. against Eastern Carolina Presbytery, to be irregular but of sufficient importance to be heard by the General Assembly, and elected a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Codling et al. v. Eastern Canada Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 13, a complaint of Donald Codling et al. against Eastern Canada Presbytery, to be in order and appointed a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Swain et al. v. Eastern Carolina Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The Assembly found Case 14, a complaint of RE Truman Swain et al. against Eastern Carolina Presbytery, to be in order and appointed a judicial commission to adjudicate the case.

cases.title: Reference 1 from Central Carolina Presbytery (New Life Presbyterian Church)

parties.respondent_or_court: New Life Presbyterian Church Session / related parties

cases.synopsis: The Assembly ratified the interim advice to Reference 1 from Central Carolina Presbytery (dated January 26, 1983) regarding New Life Presbyterian Church, directing the Presbytery to suspend the Session and assume original jurisdiction; a judicial commission was appointed to adjudicate all related matters including Reference 1 and Cases 6, 8, 10, and 12 against Central Carolina Presbytery.
